name: Challenger Gold Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.1388. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.1400 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.1388, stop A$0.1139, target A$0.1450. Risk/reward is 0.25:1.
